landing.hero_subtitle: EduBridge AI connects underserved students with scholarships, government schemes, and personalized career guidance using cutting-edge AI.
landing.feature1_desc: Our AI analyzes your profile against 200+ scholarships and government schemes to find your best matches.
landing.feature2_desc: Get a customized study plan and timeline tailored to your goals, marks, and career interests.
landing.feature3_desc: Access everything in your regional language. Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Bengali, and more.
landing.feature4_desc: Upload your marksheet or Aadhaar — our AI reads and fills your profile automatically.
landing.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of students who found their path with EduBridge AI.
